title: Wano’s Long Night Begins to Break
description: On pages 18–19, this part focuses on Unknown person #16, Nami, Momonosuke, Unknown person #17, Kaido, Luffy as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Onigashima is in the way!! Move it!!

dialogue.text: Is he prepared to punch through the island?!
